[{,",f,e,e,d,",:,[,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,6,p,o,d,t,s,u,u,2,v,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,b,m,f,x,b,2,2,f,p,5,j,j,n,m,w,2,r,6,f,c,e,g,b,n,l,4,k,v,4,f,h,u,j,y,j,f,7,k,q,5,e,f,b,q,f,h,g,3,3,z,4,4,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,6,:,0,1,:,0,9,.,7,1,8,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,c,l,f,e,b,f,d,5,a,n,f,u,6,k,m,q,3,v,t,n,j,t,k,z,5,7,e,2,h,2,5,u,q,r,j,n,b,m,z,x,d,e,x,5,5,y,o,d,o,k,4,y,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,5,4,1,2,9,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,r,Y,P,B,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,p,e,r,s,o,n,n,e,s, ,s,o,n,t, ,m,o,r,t,e,s, ,e,t, ,q,u,a,t,r,e, ,a,u,t,r,e,s,,, ,d,o,n,t, ,d,e,u,x, ,m,i,n,e,u,r,s,,, ,o,n,t, ,é,t,é, ,g,r,i,è,v,e,m,e,n,t, ,b,l,e,s,s,é,e,s, ,l,u,n,d,i, ,s,o,i,r, ,l,o,r,s, ,d,’,u,n,e, ,f,u,s,i,l,l,a,d,e, ,d,a,n,s, ,l,a, ,m,u,n,i,c,i,p,a,l,i,t,é, ,d,’,E,l, ,E,j,i,d,o, ,p,r,è,s, ,d,’,A,l,m,e,r,i,a, ,e,n, ,E,s,p,a,g,n,e,,, ,r,a,p,p,o,r,t,e, ,l,e, ,q,u,o,t,i,d,i,e,n, ,E,l, ,P,a,í,s,.,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,r,Y,P,B,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,c,l,f,e,b,f,d,5,a,n,f,u,6,k,m,q,3,v,t,n,j,t,k,z,5,7,e,2,h,2,5,u,q,r,j,n,b,m,z,x,d,e,x,5,5,y,o,d,o,k,4,y,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,c,l,f,e,b,f,d,5,a,n,f,u,6,k,m,q,3,v,t,n,j,t,k,z,5,7,e,2,h,2,5,u,q,r,j,n,b,m,z,x,d,e,x,5,5,y,o,d,o,k,4,y,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,4,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,6,:,0,1,:,2,3,.,4,7,1,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,6,n,w,x,m,b,n,o,2,y,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,h,z,b,z,b,n,5,z,g,3,c,d,p,y,b,y,c,w,x,w,o,n,3,i,j,w,v,j,a,o,w,o,5,7,h,v,g,w,m,q,k,7,q,5,2,4,f,s,z,n,d,y,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,5,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,d,k,3,6,n,z,4,z,x,a,q,n,j,b,3,e,5,o,3,n,r,h,q,y,7,6,j,f,7,y,7,3,h,g,j,k,j,l,c,f,h,w,3,g,e,7,5,s,a,c,4,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,2,5,5,7,1,0,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,k,Q,S,S,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,1 ,a,u,p,r,è,s, ,d,e, ,L,a,u,r,e,n,t, ,N,u,ñ,e,z,,, ,c,e,t, ,a,n,c,i,e,n, ,é,l,u, ,L,R, ,d,é,f,e,n,d,,, ,a,v,e,c, ,l,e, ,p,r,o,j,e,t, ,d,e, ,l,o,i, ,R,i,p,o,s,t,,, ,u,n, ,a,r,s,e,n,a,l, ,d,e, ,s,a,n,c,t,i,o,n,s, ,c,o,n,t,r,e, ,l,a, ,d,é,l,i,n,q,u,a,n,c,e,.,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,k,Q,S,S,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,d,k,3,6,n,z,4,z,x,a,q,n,j,b,3,e,5,o,3,n,r,h,q,y,7,6,j,f,7,y,7,3,h,g,j,k,j,l,c,f,h,w,3,g,e,7,5,s,a,c,4,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,d,k,3,6,n,z,4,z,x,a,q,n,j,b,3,e,5,o,3,n,r,h,q,y,7,6,j,f,7,y,7,3,h,g,j,k,j,l,c,f,h,w,3,g,e,7,5,s,a,c,4,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,2,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,7,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,5,:,3,0,:,2,4,.,8,6,3,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,6,m,b,b,3,5,f,y,2,6,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,h,3,u,x,e,y,u,5,j,c,m,n,i,b,p,p,q,x,w,4,l,v,g,n,c,v,l,c,2,p,6,l,y,6,n,l,u,r,d,h,z,y,k,4,e,2,a,d,m,q,h,a,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,5,:,0,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,7,t,q,e,t,x,c,6,r,g,c,5,j,a,l,4,b,k,b,p,k,l,e,w,m,d,i,k,a,u,2,2,i,n,p,f,n,t,k,7,a,a,4,w,w,r,d,p,p,e,4,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,4,6,2,4,7,0,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,l,1,M,L,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,1 ,é,l,e,c,t,e,u,r, ,s,u,r, ,s,i,x, ,a, ,u,t,i,l,i,s,é, ,u,n, ,o,u,t,i,l, ,d,’,i,n,t,e,l,l,i,g,e,n,c,e, ,a,r,t,i,f,i,c,i,e,l,l,e, ,p,o,u,r, ,a,r,r,ê,t,e,r, ,s,o,n, ,c,h,o,i,x, ,d,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,4,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,b,4,7,k,l,f,r,4,b,v,v,l,3,z,2,e,y,g,2,a,v,o,j,f,n,3,2,7,5,v,l,j,2,t,q,h,7,r,k,2,a,c,h,u,z,t,w,x,4,i,a,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,9,8,8,4,4,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,T,T,G,e,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,q,u,e, ,l,e, ,r,é,s,e,a,u, ,e,s,t, ,c,o,u,p,é, ,d,e,p,u,i,s, ,d,e,s, ,s,e,m,a,i,n,e,s,,, ,l,e, ,r,é,g,i,m,e, ,i,r,a,n,i,e,n, ,i,m,p,o,s,e, ,p,r,o,g,r,e,s,s,i,v,e,m,e,n,t, ,u,n, ,s,y,s,t,è,m,e, ,à, ,«,d,e,u,x, ,v,i,t,e,s,s,e,s,», ,o,ù, ,l,’,a,c,c,è,s, ,à, ,u,n, ,I,n,t,e,r,n,e,t, ,d,i,t, ,«,p,r,o,», ,r,e,s,t,e, ,c,o,n,d,i,t,i,o,n,n,é, ,à, ,c,e,r,t,a,i,n,s, ,c,o,r,p,s, ,d,e, ,m,é,t,i,e,r,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,T,T,G,e,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,b,4,7,k,l,f,r,4,b,v,v,l,3,z,2,e,y,g,2,a,v,o,j,f,n,3,2,7,5,v,l,j,2,t,q,h,7,r,k,2,a,c,h,u,z,t,w,x,4,i,a,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,b,4,7,k,l,f,r,4,b,v,v,l,3,z,2,e,y,g,2,a,v,o,j,f,n,3,2,7,5,v,l,j,2,t,q,h,7,r,k,2,a,c,h,u,z,t,w,x,4,i,a,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,4,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,4,:,3,0,:,1,6,.,9,7,3,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,6,i,v,n,m,m,k,h,2,m,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,c,s,v,4,6,j,u,6,c,y,2,y,w,3,l,a,x,e,c,p,y,z,d,2,w,r,l,l,6,5,z,s,m,w,4,7,u,j,2,n,h,t,t,z,5,j,a,r,m,e,j,y,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,4,:,0,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,f,7,i,e,a,7,t,l,t,e,z,s,a,k,n,a,l,7,g,s,c,p,a,z,d,s,7,p,n,3,r,n,i,u,j,z,i,r,l,k,x,j,c,c,d,w,x,e,7,m,y,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,9,8,0,2,7,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,1,f,R,N,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,1 ,C,e,s,e, ,c,h,o,i,s,i,r,a, ,l,e, ,2,0, ,m,a,i, ,s,o,n, ,n,o,u,v,e,a,u, ,p,r,é,s,i,d,e,n,t,,, ,q,u,i, ,s,e,r,a, ,u,n,e, ,f,e,m,m,e,., ,L,’,u,t,i,l,i,t,é, ,d,e, ,l,’,i,n,s,t,i,t,u,t,i,o,n, ,d,u, ,p,a,l,a,i,s, ,d,’,I,é,n,a, ,e,s,t, ,u,n,e, ,f,o,i,s, ,d,e, ,p,l,u,s, ,m,i,s,e, ,e,n, ,c,a,u,s,e,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,1,f,R,N,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,f,7,i,e,a,7,t,l,t,e,z,s,a,k,n,a,l,7,g,s,c,p,a,z,d,s,7,p,n,3,r,n,i,u,j,z,i,r,l,k,x,j,c,c,d,w,x,e,7,m,y,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,f,7,i,e,a,7,t,l,t,e,z,s,a,k,n,a,l,7,g,s,c,p,a,z,d,s,7,p,n,3,r,n,i,u,j,z,i,r,l,k,x,j,c,c,d,w,x,e,7,m,y,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,4,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,9,T,0,4,:,0,0,:,1,2,.,1,6,5,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,u,r,t,h,j,c,y,2,w,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,b,l,s,4,m,l,c,5,r,7,q,y,y,d,j,u,a,x,d,n,6,a,i,3,p,5,o,2,x,c,f,g,a,o,b,c,t,l,2,2,r,h,o,4,w,k,r,n,7,j,u,u,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,2,:,0,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,x,l,v,q,5,5,n,v,u,y,3,j,p,p,a,h,y,e,f,c,n,w,j,s,k,c,6,g,2,z,m,n,m,t,h,p,n,g,j,x,w,k,p,d,r,a,s,j,y,z,i,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,4,1,1,5,0,3,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,x,H,4,0,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,1 ,S,o,c,i,é,t,é, ,G,é,n,é,r,a,l,e, ,é,c,o,p,e, ,d,e, ,l,a, ,p,l,u,s, ,f,o,r,t,e, ,a,m,e,n,d,e, ,i,n,f,l,i,g,é,e, ,p,a,r, ,l,a, ,c,o,m,m,i,s,s,i,o,n, ,d,e,s, ,s,a,n,c,t,i,o,n,s, ,d,e, ,l,’,A,C,P,R, ,d,e,p,u,i,s, ,2,0,1,8,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,x,H,4,0,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,x,l,v,q,5,5,n,v,u,y,3,j,p,p,a,h,y,e,f,c,n,w,j,s,k,c,6,g,2,z,m,n,m,t,h,p,n,g,j,x,w,k,p,d,r,a,s,j,y,z,i,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,x,l,v,q,5,5,n,v,u,y,3,j,p,p,a,h,y,e,f,c,n,w,j,s,k,c,6,g,2,z,m,n,m,t,h,p,n,g,j,x,w,k,p,d,r,a,s,j,y,z,i,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,5,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,2,:,0,0,:,0,9,.,1,7,6,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,t,4,7,q,u,y,p,2,b,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,c,7,4,3,d,b,e,n,d,n,4,g,m,2,j,r,k,l,y,l,6,l,l,u,6,z,z,r,2,e,h,m,k,6,2,6,v,o,a,u,g,j,4,w,s,j,o,u,i,3,r,i,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,1,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,m,c,e,r,p,6,f,t,j,7,u,e,o,h,a,4,w,f,m,c,n,u,v,v,6,l,d,b,f,o,h,o,o,u,o,7,a,p,v,n,m,6,g,x,6,m,s,r,g,e,m,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,8,7,6,2,7,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,H,E,6,k,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,a,r,r,e,s,t,a,t,i,o,n,s, ,i,n,t,e,r,v,i,e,n,n,e,n,t, ,a,l,o,r,s, ,q,u,e, ,l,e, ,z,o,o, ,c,o,n,n,a,î,t, ,u,n,e, ,f,o,r,t,e, ,p,o,p,u,l,a,r,i,t,é, ,a,u,p,r,è,s, ,d,e,s, ,v,i,s,i,t,e,u,r,s, ,j,a,p,o,n,a,i,s, ,c,o,m,m,e, ,é,t,r,a,n,g,e,r,s,,, ,a,l,i,m,e,n,t,é,e, ,p,a,r, ,l,a, ,c,é,l,é,b,r,i,t,é, ,v,i,r,a,l,e, ,d,e, ,P,u,n,c,h,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,H,E,6,k,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,m,c,e,r,p,6,f,t,j,7,u,e,o,h,a,4,w,f,m,c,n,u,v,v,6,l,d,b,f,o,h,o,o,u,o,7,a,p,v,n,m,6,g,x,6,m,s,r,g,e,m,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,m,c,e,r,p,6,f,t,j,7,u,e,o,h,a,4,w,f,m,c,n,u,v,v,6,l,d,b,f,o,h,o,o,u,o,7,a,p,v,n,m,6,g,x,6,m,s,r,g,e,m,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,3,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,1,:,3,0,:,1,0,.,3,6,7,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,r,g,l,r,q,n,r,2,o,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,d,m,g,b,2,u,c,c,v,b,o,4,x,f,w,m,6,b,v,r,w,d,4,f,5,6,e,2,t,n,o,3,r,f,b,p,t,w,k,f,j,x,v,w,v,i,u,m,6,7,d,a,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,1,:,0,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,e,g,g,6,c,i,7,w,5,2,q,i,p,v,w,r,7,2,y,v,z,y,f,o,w,x,t,x,n,v,a,6,e,k,5,2,f,a,7,2,d,p,3,d,e,x,3,a,d,7,2,m,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,4,0,4,1,9,2,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,x,H,4,7,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,-, ,R,e,m,o,r,q,u,é, ,p,u,i,s, ,l,i,b,é,r,é, ,d,a,n,s, ,l,e,s, ,e,a,u,x, ,d,a,n,o,i,s,e,s, ,a,p,r,è,s, ,s,’,ê,t,r,e, ,é,c,h,o,u,é, ,à, ,p,l,u,s,i,e,u,r,s, ,r,e,p,r,i,s,e,s, ,d,a,n,s, ,l,e,s, ,e,a,u,x, ,a,l,l,e,m,a,n,d,e,s,,, ,l,e, ,c,é,t,a,c,é,,, ,t,r,è,s, ,a,f,f,a,i,b,l,i,,, ,n,’,a, ,p,a,s, ,s,u,r,v,é,c,u,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,x,H,4,7,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,e,g,g,6,c,i,7,w,5,2,q,i,p,v,w,r,7,2,y,v,z,y,f,o,w,x,t,x,n,v,a,6,e,k,5,2,f,a,7,2,d,p,3,d,e,x,3,a,d,7,2,m,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,e,g,g,6,c,i,7,w,5,2,q,i,p,v,w,r,7,2,y,v,z,y,f,o,w,x,t,x,n,v,a,6,e,k,5,2,f,a,7,2,d,p,3,d,e,x,3,a,d,7,2,m,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,3,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,1,:,0,0,:,1,0,.,8,6,9,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,p,r,3,p,b,o,y,2,b,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,f,x,4,l,7,p,w,f,i,f,n,p,l,t,w,p,j,u,s,y,j,l,y,q,y,o,h,4,e,c,h,2,d,h,z,h,b,a,q,k,l,d,v,t,z,3,v,f,x,x,l,a,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,0,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,i,x,x,s,i,4,u,q,u,v,2,5,s,m,p,m,h,a,f,b,7,w,j,w,j,3,u,u,c,g,o,p,v,a,l,2,j,4,w,q,a,r,t,4,c,6,5,a,g,2,q,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,5,1,6,6,7,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,V,t,U,2,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,a,v,o,i,r, ,s,u,b,m,e,r,g,é, ,l,’,a,u,t,o,é,d,i,t,i,o,n,,, ,l,e,s, ,m,a,n,u,s,c,r,i,t,s, ,a,s,s,i,s,t,é,s, ,p,a,r, ,I,A, ,g,a,g,n,e,n,t, ,l,’,é,d,i,t,i,o,n, ,t,r,a,d,i,t,i,o,n,n,e,l,l,e,., ,F,a,c,e, ,a,u, ,m,a,l,a,i,s,e, ,d,’,u,n,e, ,l,i,t,t,é,r,a,t,u,r,e, ,«,h,y,b,r,i,d,é,e,»,,, ,l,e,s, ,v,o,i,x, ,d,i,v,e,r,g,e,n,t,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,V,t,U,2,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,i,x,x,s,i,4,u,q,u,v,2,5,s,m,p,m,h,a,f,b,7,w,j,w,j,3,u,u,c,g,o,p,v,a,l,2,j,4,w,q,a,r,t,4,c,6,5,a,g,2,q,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,i,x,x,s,i,4,u,q,u,v,2,5,s,m,p,m,h,a,f,b,7,w,j,w,j,3,u,u,c,g,o,p,v,a,l,2,j,4,w,q,a,r,t,4,c,6,5,a,g,2,q,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,3,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,2,0,:,3,0,:,1,5,.,6,6,5,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,m,k,y,f,q,7,v,2,6,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,g,i,2,e,e,f,v,p,2,m,l,z,x,q,g,r,s,y,q,x,n,r,o,j,a,z,3,6,s,r,w,t,d,t,f,c,g,d,g,d,u,h,t,e,5,a,v,p,s,n,7,q,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,9,:,3,2,:,3,9,.,6,4,1,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,f,b,q,h,h,7,7,g,q,a,m,6,l,k,i,d,g,c,j,6,o,a,t,6,i,t,n,r,3,l,z,c,v,a,7,s,q,l,v,2,o,z,f,o,3,t,s,k,o,v,s,q,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,2,9,9,2,0,4,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,M,v,W,z,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,p,r,é,s,i,d,e,n,t, ,a,m,é,r,i,c,a,i,n, ,a,j,o,u,t,e, ,t,o,u,t,e,f,o,i,s, ,q,u,e, ,l,e,s, ,É,t,a,t,s,-,U,n,i,s, ,s,e, ,t,i,e,n,n,e,n,t, ,p,r,ê,t,s, ,à, ,l,a,n,c,e,r, ,u,n,e, ,«,a,t,t,a,q,u,e, ,m,i,l,i,t,a,i,r,e, ,à, ,g,r,a,n,d,e, ,é,c,h,e,l,l,e, ,c,o,n,t,r,e, ,l,’,I,r,a,n, ,à, ,t,o,u,t, ,m,o,m,e,n,t,,, ,s,i, ,u,n, ,a,c,c,o,r,d, ,a,c,c,e,p,t,a,b,l,e, ,n,’,é,t,a,i,t, ,p,a,s, ,t,r,o,u,v,é,», ,a,v,e,c, ,T,é,h,é,r,a,n,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,M,v,W,z, ,\,n,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,f,b,q,h,h,7,7,g,q,a,m,6,l,k,i,d,g,c,j,6,o,a,t,6,i,t,n,r,3,l,z,c,v,a,7,s,q,l,v,2,o,z,f,o,3,t,s,k,o,v,s,q,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,f,b,q,h,h,7,7,g,q,a,m,6,l,k,i,d,g,c,j,6,o,a,t,6,i,t,n,r,3,l,z,c,v,a,7,s,q,l,v,2,o,z,f,o,3,t,s,k,o,v,s,q,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,3,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,2,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,9,:,3,3,:,1,0,.,8,6,3,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,m,f,t,w,5,s,6,2,b,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,e,p,w,j,v,i,n,f,t,7,2,5,u,f,l,g,y,h,p,n,2,7,r,k,a,b,n,v,k,t,m,3,5,t,z,r,e,g,3,z,s,2,d,7,7,w,3,f,r,2,j,4,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,9,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,t,a,h,c,4,d,4,2,w,j,e,i,a,r,z,g,a,d,7,b,6,u,w,g,c,4,g,d,q,y,b,n,d,q,w,7,v,i,m,3,r,h,o,y,j,i,4,o,h,l,y,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,2,5,4,2,8,9,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,O,c,q,M,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,m,a,i,r,e, ,d,e, ,C,a,n,n,e,s, ,a, ,f,u,s,t,i,g,é, ,c,e, ,l,u,n,d,i, ,l,e,s, ,s,i,g,n,a,t,a,i,r,e,s, ,d,e, ,l,a, ,p,é,t,i,t,i,o,n, ,d,é,n,o,n,ç,a,n,t, ,«,l,’,e,m,p,r,i,s,e, ,g,r,a,n,d,i,s,s,a,n,t,e, ,d,e, ,l,’,e,x,t,r,ê,m,e, ,d,r,o,i,t,e,», ,s,u,r, ,l,e, ,c,i,n,é,m,a,., ,I,l, ,l,e,s, ,a,c,c,u,s,e, ,d,e, ,«,m,o,r,d,r,e, ,l,a, ,m,a,i,n, ,q,u,i, ,(,l,e,s,), ,n,o,u,r,r,i,t,»,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,O,c,q,M,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,t,a,h,c,4,d,4,2,w,j,e,i,a,r,z,g,a,d,7,b,6,u,w,g,c,4,g,d,q,y,b,n,d,q,w,7,v,i,m,3,r,h,o,y,j,i,4,o,h,l,y,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,t,a,h,c,4,d,4,2,w,j,e,i,a,r,z,g,a,d,7,b,6,u,w,g,c,4,g,d,q,y,b,n,d,q,w,7,v,i,m,3,r,h,o,y,j,i,4,o,h,l,y,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,4,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,9,:,3,0,:,1,7,.,2,6,0,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,i,e,v,c,7,j,5,2,u,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,a,q,2,v,v,e,7,w,u,a,6,k,n,5,3,t,7,o,o,t,f,f,q,v,e,c,m,g,a,w,t,n,6,x,6,y,q,w,e,6,m,f,x,v,z,p,y,t,k,b,o,4,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,8,:,1,8,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,q,6,i,k,l,2,r,r,b,h,g,m,v,f,y,w,e,j,f,c,u,w,6,p,6,7,c,z,z,j,4,w,v,5,z,v,e,j,q,p,3,e,5,r,z,t,m,f,6,p,u,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,2,7,1,0,2,3,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,4,V,7,4,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2,0,5,,,",b,y,t,e,S,t,a,r,t,",:,1,7,9,},},],,,",t,e,x,t,",:,",L,e,s, ,C,e,n,t,r,e,s, ,a,m,é,r,i,c,a,i,n,s, ,d,e, ,c,o,n,t,r,ô,l,e, ,e,t, ,d,e, ,p,r,é,v,e,n,t,i,o,n, ,d,e,s, ,m,a,l,a,d,i,e,s, ,o,n,t, ,a,n,n,o,n,c,é, ,l,u,n,d,i, ,q,u,’,i,l,s, ,r,e,n,f,o,r,ç,a,i,e,n,t, ,l,e,u,r,s, ,p,r,é,c,a,u,t,i,o,n,s, ,p,o,u,r, ,é,v,i,t,e,r, ,l,a, ,p,r,o,p,a,g,a,t,i,o,n, ,d,e, ,l,’,é,p,i,d,é,m,i,e,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,4,V,7,4,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,q,6,i,k,l,2,r,r,b,h,g,m,v,f,y,w,e,j,f,c,u,w,6,p,6,7,c,z,z,j,4,w,v,5,z,v,e,j,q,p,3,e,5,r,z,t,m,f,6,p,u,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,q,6,i,k,l,2,r,r,b,h,g,m,v,f,y,w,e,j,f,c,u,w,6,p,6,7,c,z,z,j,4,w,v,5,z,v,e,j,q,p,3,e,5,r,z,t,m,f,6,p,u,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,4,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,8,:,1,8,:,1,0,.,0,7,4,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,h,f,o,3,y,t,4,2,b,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,f,g,y,3,f,r,e,j,o,e,k,u,3,t,m,p,2,y,y,f,u,v,g,j,w,w,e,r,e,t,d,k,s,a,l,y,p,q,u,k,t,3,4,v,v,b,g,7,a,c,w,a,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,8,:,0,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,6,m,g,q,n,7,f,g,e,n,u,w,4,p,m,p,6,q,m,6,y,2,3,2,h,7,b,6,z,f,r,2,q,f,d,c,p,k,r,w,2,l,l,v,n,x,w,7,b,t,y,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,2,6,6,6,0,6,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,B,s,n,3,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,q,u,e, ,«,L,e, ,S,u,i,c,i,d,e, ,f,r,a,n,ç,a,i,s,»,,, ,p,u,b,l,i,é, ,e,n, ,2,0,1,4,,, ,e,s,t, ,r,é,é,d,i,t,é,,, ,l,e, ,p,r,é,s,i,d,e,n,t, ,d,e, ,R,e,c,o,n,q,u,ê,t,e, ,a,s,s,u,r,e, ,q,u,e, ,«,s,e,u,l,s, ,l,e,s, ,m,é,d,e,c,i,n,s, ,q,u,i, ,o,n,t, ,l,e,s, ,b,o,n,s, ,d,i,a,g,n,o,s,t,i,c,s, ,p,e,u,v,e,n,t, ,s,o,i,g,n,e,r, ,l,e, ,m,a,l,a,d,e,»,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,B,s,n,3,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,6,m,g,q,n,7,f,g,e,n,u,w,4,p,m,p,6,q,m,6,y,2,3,2,h,7,b,6,z,f,r,2,q,f,d,c,p,k,r,w,2,l,l,v,n,x,w,7,b,t,y,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,g,6,m,g,q,n,7,f,g,e,n,u,w,4,p,m,p,6,q,m,6,y,2,3,2,h,7,b,6,z,f,r,2,q,f,d,c,p,k,r,w,2,l,l,v,n,x,w,7,b,t,y,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,2,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,2,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,8,:,0,0,:,4,2,.,3,6,2,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,g,h,z,d,n,f,o,2,6,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,c,q,i,q,s,2,o,t,j,m,s,d,v,h,q,r,r,5,j,d,q,f,n,h,t,7,w,z,r,h,p,6,y,f,b,x,s,v,c,k,e,e,p,7,o,u,2,j,r,5,f,4,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,7,:,4,4,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,h,6,x,s,o,g,m,g,m,t,4,4,i,y,i,a,v,g,v,j,g,n,b,3,7,z,f,e,s,s,2,s,b,n,g,5,p,d,b,s,7,s,7,a,a,2,m,x,d,i,b,i,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,4,7,2,0,9,8,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,E,R,l,l,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,2 ,l,e, ,c,a,d,r,e, ,d,e, ,l,a, ,r,é,v,i,s,i,o,n, ,d,e, ,l,a, ,l,o,i, ,d,e, ,p,r,o,g,r,a,m,m,a,t,i,o,n, ,m,i,l,i,t,a,i,r,e,,, ,l,e,s, ,d,é,p,u,t,é,s, ,o,n,t, ,v,a,l,i,d,é, ,l,e, ,p,r,i,n,c,i,p,e, ,d,’,u,n, ,d,i,s,p,o,s,i,t,i,f, ,i,n,é,d,i,t, ,p,e,r,m,e,t,t,a,n,t, ,à, ,l,’,e,x,é,c,u,t,i,f, ,d,’,a,g,i,r, ,p,l,u,s, ,r,a,p,i,d,e,m,e,n,t, ,e,n, ,c,a,s, ,d,e, ,c,r,i,s,e, ,m,a,j,e,u,r,e,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,E,R,l,l,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,h,6,x,s,o,g,m,g,m,t,4,4,i,y,i,a,v,g,v,j,g,n,b,3,7,z,f,e,s,s,2,s,b,n,g,5,p,d,b,s,7,s,7,a,a,2,m,x,d,i,b,i,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,h,6,x,s,o,g,m,g,m,t,4,4,i,y,i,a,v,g,v,j,g,n,b,3,7,z,f,e,s,s,2,s,b,n,g,5,p,d,b,s,7,s,7,a,a,2,m,x,d,i,b,i,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,3,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,7,:,4,4,:,0,7,.,4,6,9,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},,,{,",p,o,s,t,",:,{,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,/,3,m,m,5,f,p,h,q,g,u,e,2,b,",,,",c,i,d,",:,",b,a,f,y,r,e,i,e,5,f,4,t,h,3,e,p,y,e,n,w,m,x,d,7,j,f,k,v,p,o,u,2,o,o,i,7,a,j,m,m,h,o,w,t,b,h,y,p,k,m,s,h,b,l,x,j,d,m,a,",,,",a,u,t,h,o,r,",:,{,",d,i,d,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,",,,",h,a,n,d,l,e,",:,",l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,",,,",d,i,s,p,l,a,y,N,a,m,e,",:,",L,e, ,F,i,g,a,r,o,",,,",a,v,a,t,a,r,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,a,v,a,t,a,r,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,b,r,q,h,3,i,n,y,l,7,c,m,h,t,t,h,e,i,h,n,j,z,n,a,w,q,x,o,6,2,v,2,k,5,x,7,u,k,w,c,3,x,g,k,v,h,7,2,w,4,a,q,",,,",a,s,s,o,c,i,a,t,e,d,",:,{,",a,c,t,i,v,i,t,y,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",a,l,l,o,w,S,u,b,s,c,r,i,p,t,i,o,n,s,",:,",f,o,l,l,o,w,e,r,s,",},},,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,3,-,1,0,-,2,7,T,0,9,:,5,1,:,3,8,.,5,4,5,Z,",,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,",:,{,",v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,s,",:,[,{,",i,s,s,u,e,r,",:,",d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",a,t,:,/,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,7,2,i,7,h,d,y,n,m,k,6,r,2,2,z,2,7,h,6,t,v,u,r,/,a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,g,r,a,p,h,.,v,e,r,i,f,i,c,a,t,i,o,n,/,3,l,v,r,c,c,l,w,r,i,b,2,6,",,,",i,s,V,a,l,i,d,",:,t,r,u,e,,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,5,-,0,8,-,0,6,T,2,2,:,4,3,:,1,7,.,1,2,9,Z,",},],,,",v,e,r,i,f,i,e,d,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",v,a,l,i,d,",,,",t,r,u,s,t,e,d,V,e,r,i,f,i,e,r,S,t,a,t,u,s,",:,",n,o,n,e,",},},,,",r,e,c,o,r,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,f,e,e,d,.,p,o,s,t,",,,",c,r,e,a,t,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,7,:,3,0,:,0,0,.,0,0,0,Z,",,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,",,,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},,,",i,m,a,g,e,",:,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",b,l,o,b,",,,",r,e,f,",:,{,",$,l,i,n,k,",:,",b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,c,f,n,r,f,7,p,7,m,h,t,6,e,f,u,3,5,q,r,z,c,q,z,s,p,r,4,c,d,j,6,x,j,z,p,e,c,q,p,j,4,z,4,e,k,n,w,a,n,f,y,",},,,",m,i,m,e,T,y,p,e,",:,",i,m,a,g,e,/,j,p,e,g,",,,",s,i,z,e,",:,3,9,2,9,3,4,},},],},,,",f,a,c,e,t,s,",:,[,{,",f,e,a,t,u,r,e,s,",:,[,{,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,r,i,c,h,t,e,x,t,.,f,a,c,e,t,#,l,i,n,k,",,,",u,r,i,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,W,b,0,t,",},],,,",i,n,d,e,x,",:,{,",b,y,t,e,E,n,d,",:,1 ,j,o,u,r, ,d,u, ,l,a,n,c,e,m,e,n,t,,, ,i,l, ,y, ,a, ,e,u, ,d,e,s, ,p,r,o,b,l,è,m,e,s, ,d,a,n,s, ,e,n,v,i,r,o,n, ,u,n,e, ,v,i,n,g,t,a,i,n,e, ,d,e, ,m,a,g,a,s,i,n,s, ,S,w,a,t,c,h, ,s,u,r, ,2,2,0, ,d,a,n,s, ,l,e, ,m,o,n,d,e,»,,, ,a, ,r,e,c,o,n,n,u, ,l,’,h,o,r,l,o,g,e,r, ,s,u,i,s,s,e,., ,→,h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,l,.,l,e,f,i,g,a,r,o,.,f,r,/,W,b,0,t,",},,,",e,m,b,e,d,",:,{,",i,m,a,g,e,s,",:,[,{,",t,h,u,m,b,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,t,h,u,m,b,n,a,i,l,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,c,f,n,r,f,7,p,7,m,h,t,6,e,f,u,3,5,q,r,z,c,q,z,s,p,r,4,c,d,j,6,x,j,z,p,e,c,q,p,j,4,z,4,e,k,n,w,a,n,f,y,",,,",f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,",:,",h,t,t,p,s,:,/,/,c,d,n,.,b,s,k,y,.,a,p,p,/,i,m,g,/,f,e,e,d,_,f,u,l,l,s,i,z,e,/,p,l,a,i,n,/,d,i,d,:,p,l,c,:,z,n,u,3,b,m,h,x,5,m,x,2,i,c,u,c,i,l,i,x,5,r,p,a,/,b,a,f,k,r,e,i,a,c,f,n,r,f,7,p,7,m,h,t,6,e,f,u,3,5,q,r,z,c,q,z,s,p,r,4,c,d,j,6,x,j,z,p,e,c,q,p,j,4,z,4,e,k,n,w,a,n,f,y,",,,",a,l,t,",:,",",,,",a,s,p,e,c,t,R,a,t,i,o,",:,{,",h,e,i,g,h,t,",:,1,3,5,0,,,",w,i,d,t,h,",:,1,0,8,0,},},],,,",$,t,y,p,e,",:,",a,p,p,.,b,s,k,y,.,e,m,b,e,d,.,i,m,a,g,e,s,#,v,i,e,w,",},,,",b,o,o,k,m,a,r,k,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,l,y,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",r,e,p,o,s,t,C,o,u,n,t,",:,1,,,",l,i,k,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,2,,,",q,u,o,t,e,C,o,u,n,t,",:,0,,,",i,n,d,e,x,e,d,A,t,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,7,:,3,0,:,2,3,.,6,7,5,Z,",,,",l,a,b,e,l,s,",:,[,],},},],,,",c,u,r,s,o,r,",:,",2,0,2,6,-,0,5,-,1,8,T,1,7,:,3,0,:,0,0,Z,",}]
